data.content: Added ISO timestamp and beat state to all 7 terminal TAKE N/ log messages in terminal-manager.ts. Format changed from '--- Take N/M ---' to '--- 2026-03-09T... state_name TAKE N/M ---'. Also updated claimed, stop (terminal state, not agent-owned, max iterations) messages. All tests pass (1948/1948). Commit 85303d57 pushed to main.
